_note: Sample stories for the v1 listing. No individual post pages yet (v1.1). Drop cover images into images/blog/ with these filenames or update the paths.

posts.title: How we fried the world's longest churro
posts.excerpt: In 2023 our team set the Guinness World Record. Here is how a single churro stretched past every record before it.

posts.title: One shop, one fryer, one recipe
posts.excerpt: The recipe we opened with in Caracas in 1997 is the same one in every store today. We kept it on purpose.

posts.title: Why dulce de leche is our house dip
posts.excerpt: Thick, slow, and impossible to improve on. A short love letter to the dip that outsells the rest.

posts.title: From Caracas to Gran Vía
posts.excerpt: How a franchise partner brought ChurroManía to the middle of Madrid, and what it took to open.

posts.title: Meet Twist Manía
posts.excerpt: Filled churros, twisted by hand. A look at the line that put the filling front and center.
